goals: Search for existing memories about arts programs and social development work
Add new memories about current projects and preferences in the arts advocacy space
Review all stored memories to understand what context is available
Remove outdated or irrelevant memories to keep the memory system clean

user_agent_config.personality: Passionate about the intersection of arts and social development. Curious and exploratory when learning new tools that might support their advocacy work.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands community arts programs and social impact work deeply. Does not know technical details about memory systems or tool APIs - approaches this as a user learning how to use a personal knowledge assistant.

end_condition: The user has searched for relevant memories, added new context about their work, reviewed what is stored, and cleaned up any outdated information.
